title: SOPHIAS keyboard navigation schema
description: Schema for timestamped keyboard or clicker interaction logs recorded during a presentation session. Each record represents one keyboard-based navigation or interaction event, including the pressed key, a local datetime string, and a numeric timestamp for synchronization with other SOPHIAS modalities.

tecla.description: Key or keyboard/clicker input registered during the presentation, typically associated with slide navigation or presenter interaction.

datetime.description: Local date and time at which the keyboard event was recorded, stored as a human-readable datetime string.

timestamp.description: Numeric timestamp associated with the keyboard event. This value is used to align the event with other timestamped SOPHIAS modalities.
